title: Sanger Sequencing for Genes Causing Intellectual Disability
author: Megan McSherry
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.tzxep7n

steps.title: The DNA concentration per sample is 20 ng/μL
steps.instruction: The DNA concentration per sample is 20 ng/μL

steps.title: Calculate the number of reactions to...
steps.instruction: Calculate the number of reactions to be performed for each assay, including recommended controls. %s %s Use negative and positive control. Prepare excess volume to account for pipetting errors.

steps.title: %s %s
steps.instruction: %s %s

steps.title: Add dry Sephadex G-50 (VWR cat
steps.instruction: Add dry Sephadex G-50 (VWR cat. 95016-

steps.title: to Millipore (cat
steps.instruction: to Millipore (cat. #MACL

steps.title: 45 ul column loader (black mold plate)
steps.instruction: 45 ul column loader (black mold plate)

steps.title: Place a Pall Corportation multi-well plate (VWR cat
steps.instruction: Place a Pall Corportation multi-well plate (VWR cat. 97052-

steps.title: on top of the black mold plate
steps.instruction: on top of the black mold plate

steps.title: Carefully turn both plates over and...
steps.instruction: Carefully turn both plates over and tap the mold plate causing Sephadex to fall into wells

steps.title: Add 300 ul of dH2O to each well
steps.instruction: Add 300 ul of dH2O to each well

steps.title: Cover plate with adhesive seal (Applied Biosystems cat
steps.instruction: Cover plate with adhesive seal (Applied Biosystems cat. 4306311). Write date on plate

steps.title: Allow plates to hydrate for 2 hours before use
steps.instruction: Allow plates to hydrate for 2 hours before use. Plates can stand in room temperature for 2 days. Can be stored at 4°C for two weeks (if stored at 4°C the plate must incubate at room temperature for 2 hours before use)

steps.title: Remove plate from PCR machine Sephadex...
steps.instruction: Remove plate from PCR machine Sephadex must be brought to room temperature, and adhesive seal removed Place Sephadex plate on top of 96-well Centrifuge sephadex plate for 5 min at 850 x g and dispose of the eluate Bring PCR products to volume of 20 ul (should be what is remaining in PCR tube following Gel Run) Add 4ul of SOPE resin directly to the PCR product mix thoroughlyby tip mix Pipette the entire SOPE/PCR reaction mixture into the center of the wells of the Sephadex plate making sure the fluid runs into column Stack the loaded Sephadex plate on a 96-well plate (Life Technologies cat. 4346907) Tape the plates together Centrifuge for 5 minutes at 850 x g and Retain Eluate, dispose of sephadex plate If product will not be used immediately it can be stored at 4°C overnight or -20°C long term

steps.instruction: Calculate the number of reactions to be performed for each assay %s %s

steps.instruction: %s %s

steps.title: Pipette 10 ul of dH2O directly in sequencing reactions
steps.instruction: Pipette 10 ul of dH2O directly in sequencing reactions

steps.title: Transfer entire sequencing reaction volume (approximately...
steps.instruction: Transfer entire sequencing reaction volume (approximately 20 ul) directly to sephadex columns (load to center of the sephadex column without touching the column.

steps.title: Stack the Sephadex plate on top...
steps.instruction: Stack the Sephadex plate on top of a 96-well ABI sequencing plate (cat

steps.title: Tape the plates together
steps.instruction: Tape the plates together

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 minutes at 850...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 minutes at 850 x g and Keep Eluate

steps.title: Pipette 20 ul of dH20 directly...
steps.instruction: Pipette 20 ul of dH20 directly into any empty wells that will be included in run a. 3130 sequencer has 16 capillaries per run (there must be liquid in each well)

steps.title: Seal the Plate with Adhesive tape,...
steps.instruction: Seal the Plate with Adhesive tape, cover with aluminum foil, and label appropriately

steps.title: Eluate can be stored at 4°C...
steps.instruction: Eluate can be stored at 4°C overnight, and -20°C for two days

steps.title: For optimal results sequence immediately or asap
steps.instruction: For optimal results sequence immediately or asap
